Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log Activities that appear multiple times within same case Verify Documents appears twice in C001 and C003 Call Customer appears twice in C002 also Verify Documents appears in all cases but with different context

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In C001 first Verify Documents is initial check then after missing docs re check In C003 first physical verification then re verify after adjustment In C002 Call Customer first is outbound to clarify discrepancy second is follow up to confirm adjustments

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also note Adjust Account appears in C002 and C003 but only once each so not recurring within same case Initiate Request appears once per case Approve Request once Submit Additional appears only in C001 So recurring activities Verify Documents and Call Customer

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to rename them to reflect context For Verify Documents first occurrence could be Initial Document Verification second Re Verify Documents after Corrections For Call Customer first Outbound Call to Clarify Issue second Follow up Call to Confirm Resolution

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since the log is given we can decide to rename all instances of recurring activities to be context specific For example Verify Documents appears in all cases but in C001 and C003 it appears twice So we can rename all Verify Documents to distinguish first occurrences become Initial Document Verification second become Re Verify Documents

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The better approach is to rename all instances of the activity to reflect their context thereby eliminating the ambiguity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Verify Documents C001 first Initial Document Verification C001 second Re Verify Documents after Customer Submission C002 Initial Document Verification C003 first Initial Document Verification C003 second Re Verify Documents after Account Adjustment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Call Customer C001 Call Customer to Request Missing Documents C002 first Call Customer to Clarify Discrepancy C002 second Call Customer to Confirm Adjustments C003 Call Customer to Return to Branch

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The main issue is the repeated activities that cause confusion So I will keep Initiate Request unchanged Similarly Adjust Account appears twice but in different cases not within same case so leave as is Submit Additional only once Approve Request once
